title: How ForgeMeter Connects via Official APIs Without Intercepting Code
excerpt: Security teams block proxies; developers hate friction. ForgeMeter's read-only API model delivers spend visibility without touching source code.
bodyHtml:
Many "AI analytics" products ask for network proxies or IDE plugins that inspect every prompt. Security reviews stall; developers disable them. ForgeMeter took a different path: official vendor APIs only.

What ForgeMeter accesses

  • Cursor Enterprise usage and billing metrics
  • GitHub Copilot Metrics API aggregates
  • OpenAI and Anthropic organization billing and usage APIs

What ForgeMeter does not access

  • Source code, diffs, or file contents
  • Prompt text or model responses
  • Write scopes on production systems

Why this matters for rollout

Read-only OAuth and billing tokens typically skip lengthy security exceptions. Most teams connect in under five minutes—no agents to install, no changes to developer laptops.

Deployment options

SaaS is the default; enterprise buyers evaluating data residency should discuss requirements with the ForgeMeter team via forgemeter.com.

ForgeMeter is part of the Saabsa Solutions product portfolio alongside Patientree AI, DataXPipe, and Lease Exit—unified by a security-first approach to production software.
